content: Single-file vanilla JS widget distribution pattern (used by chat widgets, analytics/tag-manager scripts): one <script> tag loads a self-contained IIFE bundle; the script reads its own config via document.currentScript.dataset or an inline config object; init is synchronous and idempotent (guards against double-inclusion); all host-page communication goes through postMessage or a narrow public API attached to window, never direct DOM mutation of host elements beyond the injected overlay. Widgets in this class report to be robust in the tens-of-KB range for a single bundled file.
